methodsAttempted.query: site:iitm.ac.in ("generative AI" OR GenAI OR ChatGPT OR "artificial intelligence") (policy OR guidelines OR academic integrity OR students OR teaching) "IIT Madras"
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found official IITM AI research, press, course, and initiative pages; none were central AI-use policy evidence.
Firecrawl search surfaced the IIT Madras BS Degree Honour Code as the only policy-specific result with LLM academic-integrity language.

methodsAttempted.query: site:onlinedegree.iitm.ac.in ("LLMs" OR ChatGPT OR Gemini OR "generative AI") "IIT Madras"
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search confirmed the official Honour Code page and did not find broader online-degree AI policy pages.

methodsAttempted.query: site:study.iitm.ac.in ("ChatGPT" OR "LLM" OR "generative AI") ("honour code" OR policy OR plagiarism OR academic)
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found generative-AI course pages and academic catalog pages; these were not policy evidence.
No official central academic-integrity AI-use page was found for this query.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery did not find a central IIT Madras AI-use policy. The only verified policy-specific source found during this run was the IIT Madras BS Degree Honour Code, which is scoped to participation in the IIT Madras BS Degree program and contains LLM-specific academic-integrity language. Other official AI pages were rejected as research, initiative, press, or course pages rather than policy evidence.

artifacts.verificationNotes: Official IIT Madras BS Degree Honour Code page. Claims are scoped to the IIT Madras BS Degree program because the source says it applies to participation in that program.

stopConditions: Stop after the verified Honour Code source is fetched and claim/evidence candidates are staged.
Do not infer institute-wide IIT Madras policy from program-scoped BS Degree Honour Code evidence.
Do not use research, course, press, or AI program pages as policy evidence.

artifacts.claimText: For IIT Madras BS Degree Honour Code violations, the page says actions may include zero or no credit, withholding or revocation of a certificate or degree, unenrollment, termination of site use, additional action at IIT Madras' discretion, and no refunds.
artifacts.normalizedValue: BS Degree Honour Code violations may trigger academic and access consequences

citation.publisher: Indian Institute of Technology Madras BS Degree Program
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: If you are found in violation of the Terms of Service or Honour Code, you may be subject to one or more of the following actions: Receiving a zero or no credit for an assignment; Having any certificate/degree earned in the course or program withheld or revoked; Being unenrolled from a course or program; or Termination of your use of the IIT Madras BS DEGREE Site. Additional actions may be taken at the sole discretion of IIT Madras. No refunds will be issued in the case of any corrective action for such violations.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The Honour Code lists possible consequences for violations, including zero credit, withheld or revoked credentials, unenrollment, termination, discretionary actions, and no refunds.

artifacts.title: Indian Institute of Technology Madras BS Honour Code LLM Policy Staged Review
artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery for Indian Institute of Technology Madras found a policy-specific IIT Madras BS Degree Honour Code page with LLM-related academic-integrity language. The staged claims are intentionally limited to the BS Degree program and cover Honour Code scope, LLM-generated code as plagiarism, LLM use without explicit permission as a violation, and possible Honour Code violation actions. Official IITM AI research, press, initiative, and executive-course pages were rejected as non-policy evidence.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Claims are scoped to the IIT Madras BS Degree program because the verified Honour Code source says it applies to participation in that program.
This run did not find a central IIT Madras institute-wide AI-use policy on official domains.
Research, press, initiative, and course pages about AI were not used as policy evidence.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
